source_title: 04 Tunnel - Raya and the Last Dragon/15 Volumetric Fog

evidences.content: 现在，我们可以做的最后一件事就是提升拍摄效果，让它们更接近好莱坞电影。 Now one last thing that we can do that really starts to elevate your shots and make them feel a lot closer to Hollywood movies 在场景中添加体积雾，这是因为几乎每部电影的场景都是 is by adding volumetric fog in your scenes and this is because almost every single movie set is 用雾来增加场景的深度和气氛，你会惊讶地发现，甚至 using fog to add more depth and atmosphere into their scenes and you'd be surprised how even 喜剧或戏剧性不强的电视节目通常会使用雾 Comedies or less dramatic TV shows oftentimes will use fog 我会说这是一个低级的把戏，但说实话，它确实为浅显的场景增添了许多深度 I'll call it a cheap trick, but honestly it does add a lot more depth into shallow scenes 在这里我们可以看到，背景中确实有一些烟雾和浓雾 And we can see here that we do get a bit smokier and some dense fog in the background here 因此，我认为这次拍摄可以从中受益匪浅 So I think this shot could really benefit from it 因此，我们在镜头中加入这种效果的方法是通过指数高度雾化演员来实现的。 So the way that we add that into our shots is through an exponential height fog actor now 我们很早就通过环境光混合器添加了这一功能 We added this through our environment light mixer early on 但有一个复选框需要打勾，那就是体积雾复选框 But there's one checkbox that we need to tick inside of here and that is the volumetric fog checkbox 因此，我们可以将雾密度设置得很高，比如 1，然后 so we could set our fog density to something really high like 1 and 老实说，这已经非常接近我们在场景中看到的效果了。 This will just crank it and honestly that already gets us very very close to what we're seeing in our scene 但这有点像 "一锤定音"。 But this is kind of hitting it with a hammer 但需要注意的是，场景中的每一束光都会产生体积雾 But one thing to note is every single light in your scene casts volumetric fog 但如果在场景中输入体积参数 But if you type in volumetric into your scene 每种光线都有两个选项，即体积散射强度和投射体积阴影 You'll get two options for every light and that is volumetric scattering intensity and cast volumetric shadow 因此，我们场景中的某些灯光，如聚光灯，会被用来在前景中获得一些额外的光线。 So certain lights in our scene like our spotlights that we're cheating to get some additional light in foreground 我们总能发现我们在欺骗体积光，因为我们只是把它放在了空气中一个不可能的位置。 We're always going to be able to tell when we're cheating that volumetric light because we're just placing it in an impossible spot in the air 因此，在这样的灯光下，我会把它们全部调到零 So on lights like this, I'll bring them all the way down to zero 我们要确保任何投射体积雾的光线在我们的场景中都是合理的 We want to just make sure that any light that's casting volumetric fog feels justified within our scene 因为这可能会很快变得非常密集 Because this can get really dense really really quickly 因此，你可以看到，只需减少这两个关键光源，我们就能在这里获得回声 So you can see by just reducing those two and for that key light that we have an echo here 这样，我们场景中的浓雾就被驱散了许多 Reducing that already clears out a lot of the dense fog that we have in our scene 点光源 5 是我们的蓝光 Point light 5 is our blue light 我们可以将体积散射强度调到 10 左右，看看效果如何。 We could crank this volumetric scattering intensity to something like 10 just to see what the effect is and we get this really interesting 异世界的雾气从背景中滚滚而来，我觉得这看起来很酷 Otherworldly fog that kind of rolls in through the background, which I think looks cool 这确实让人觉得可信度大打折扣 It does start to make this feel a lot less believable 因此，要在逼真与创意趣味之间取得微妙的平衡。 So it's gonna be a fine balance between what's realistic and what is just creatively interesting and if you increase the intensity of your light 它还将增加 It will also increase how much 对体积雾的影响 Contribution it has to the volumetric fog 因此，如果我将其提高到 16 档并加倍，就会开始增加我们的雾量 So if I bring this up a stop to 16 and double it this will start to increase our fog 不过，由于我们的雾度设置仍然很低，只有 3 级左右，因此不会造成太大的影响。 But because our fog is still set fairly low to something like 3 it's not cheating it too much 因此，我想我会把它保持在 1.5 左右。 So I think I'll keep this at about 1.5 现在，由于我们的场景中有大量的雾气，蓝光被削弱了很多，因为我们有 And now because we have so much fog inside of our scene that blue light is being played down quite a bit because we have 我们这里的女演员和背景中的雾密度如此之高 So much density of fog in between our actress here and the fog in the background 因此，我只是要玩玩强度，我认为它确实开始打破，并很快变得令人难以置信 So I'm just gonna play around with the intensity and I think it does start to break and become unbelievable pretty quick 因此，我想我会把它保持在 16 左右，可能会在这里提高一点饱和度。 So I think I'll leave this around 16 and I'll probably boost the saturation just a touch here 现在，您可以看到我是否启用或禁用了指数高度雾 And now you can see if I enable and disable our exponential height fog 您可以看到，这也有助于勾勒出我们的人物轮廓 You can see this also helps silhouette our characters 我们可以更清楚地看到她手臂的轮廓 We get a much cleaner read on the silhouette of her arm 而现在，她的阴暗面也变得更加生动形象了 And now her dark side where the shadows are as a much more graphic shape 对我来说，这更有趣一些 Which to me is just a bit more interesting 而在此之前，所有这些黑人都是在后台工作的 Whereas before every we have all these blacks going all the way into the background 因此，一旦我们有了指数高度的雾，我们就读不到那种强烈的英雄形象了。 So we don't read that strong heroic shape that we're getting once we have exponential height fog 现在，做一些内务整理，检查每一盏灯并确保 Now it's always good to do some housekeeping and just go through every single light and make sure 因为照明太少和太暗之间的平衡非常微妙。 it's doing exactly what you think it is because there's a really fine balance between too little lighting and 对场景进行过度照明，我认为在虚幻世界中，对场景进行过度照明并将大量灯光塞入场景中的情况更为常见。 Overlighting your scene and I think in unreal it's more common to over light your scene and just cram in a ton of lights 但我们可以看到 But we can see here 我们只有不到 10 盏灯，如果你试着想想，如果你在电影拍摄现场，会发生什么？ We have less than 10 lights which again if you try to think of if you're on a film set what would happen? 他们会怎么做？考虑到地理位置，他们会做出哪些选择？ What would they do? What choices would they make given the physical location? 考虑到我们的两盏照明灯，我认为这是非常合理的。 And I think this is pretty reasonable considering two of our lights 我们知道，要让前景光的亮度与参考光相匹配，我们就要作弊了 We know we're cheating to get this foreground light to match our reference in terms of brightness 如果将我们的镜头与拉亚和最后一条龙的镜头进行比较 If you compare our shot to the one from Raya and the last dragon 他们利用亮度来引导你的视线，这其实很有趣 It's actually interesting how they're using brightness to lead your eye 这个镜头的故事性在于，我们其实是想看看拉娅从洞穴中往下看的地方 The storytelling of this shot is that we actually want to look at where Raya is looking down the cave 这把火炬是我们现场最亮的东西 And that's right by this torch as the brightest thing in our scene 而在我们的案例中，鉴于她正在向外看，并经过摄像头 Whereas in our case given that she's looking out and past camera 我认为在这种情况下，确保她是最聪明的人是非常有意义的。好的 I think it makes a lot of sense in this case to make sure that she is the brightest thing. All right 我想现在 Well, I think for now 我们做得很好 We've done a pretty good job 与我们的参考精神相匹配，并为我们镜头内的变化增添一点创意色彩 Matching the spirit of our reference and adding a little bit of creative flair given the changes that we're doing inside of our shot 所以，现在我想继续前进，毕竟我想增加一点动感 So now I'd like to move on I'd like to add a little bit of movement after all 我们正在尝试使用虚幻的视觉效果来制作电影 We're trying to use unreal for visual effects to make movies 这就意味着我们必须让图像动起来，而做到这一点的好方法就是添加特效元素，如火 And that means we have to make our images move and a great way to do that is by adding effects elements like fire 因此，我们要在这些火把上添加一些火焰，并学习如何创建循环元素 So we're gonna add some fire onto these torches and learn how to create looping elements 专门用于虚幻，而不是调入我们硬盘上的任何视频片段 Specifically for unreal and not just pull in any video clip that we have on our hard drive 我们首先要弄清楚，如何才能制作出最适合虚幻游戏引擎工作方式的元素？ We want to figure out how can we make elements that work best for the way that unreal works as a game engine first? 然后，我们会加入一些次生颗粒，比如一些尘埃护城河，一些漂浮在空气中的尘埃颗粒 And then we'll add in some secondary particles like some dust moats some dust particles that are floating through the air 只是为了增加另一层动感。请继续关注，我们将深入了解下一个特效 Just to add another layer of movement. So stick around and we'll dive in to effects next
